---
name: Feature request
about: Propose a scoped improvement to the bridge runtime, pairing helper contract, docs, or test flow
title: "[feature] "
labels: ["enhancement"]
assignees: []
---

## Problem or goal

What are you trying to do, or what is missing today?

## Proposed change

Describe the smallest useful version of the feature.

## Why this matters

Who benefits, and how?

## Scope

Which area does this touch?

- transport runtime
- pairing flow contract
- OpenClaw integration
- mock bridge / local testing
- docs / examples
- repo automation / CI

## Constraints or guardrails

List anything we should avoid, especially around proprietary code, private endpoints, or credential leakage.

## Additional context

Links, screenshots, traces, or prior experiments.
